query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `mcmRequests` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `requestNumber` varchar(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `operationType` enum('create','modify','deactivate','renew','replace_lost','replace_damaged') NOT NULL,
  `cardId` int,
  `status` enum('draft','pending','approved','rejected','cancelled') DEFAULT 'draft' NOT NULL,
  `requestedBy` int NOT NULL,
  `requestedFor` int,
  `requestedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `formData` json,
  `accessLevelsRequested` json,
  `modificationType` enum('add_access','remove_access','change_access'),
  `modificationReason` text,
  `deactivationReason` enum('resignation','termination','contract_ended','security_concern','other'),
  `effectiveDate` timestamp NULL,
  `lostDamagedType` enum('lost','stolen','damaged'),
  `lostDamagedDetails` text,
  `createReplacement` boolean DEFAULT false,
  `workflowInstanceId` int,
  `currentStageId` int,
  `completedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `completedBy` int,
  `resultCardId` int,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `mcmRequests_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user BsRQq1X2Mh9kZmK.6749932367bb --database WqXabcMRQ5aEFJ4QyeefuN --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `mcmRequests` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `requestNumber` varchar(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `operationType` enum('create','modify','deactivate','renew','replace_lost','replace_damaged') NOT NULL,
  `cardId` int,
  `status` enum('draft','pending','approved','rejected','cancelled') DEFAULT 'draft' NOT NULL,
  `requestedBy` int NOT NULL,
  `requestedFor` int,
  `requestedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `formData` json,
  `accessLevelsRequested` json,
  `modificationType` enum('add_access','remove_access','change_access'),
  `modificationReason` text,
  `deactivationReason` enum('resignation','termination','contract_ended','security_concern','other'),
  `effectiveDate` timestamp NULL,
  `lostDamagedType` enum('lost','stolen','damaged'),
  `lostDamagedDetails` text,
  `createReplacement` boolean DEFAULT false,
  `workflowInstanceId` int,
  `currentStageId` int,
  `completedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `completedBy` int,
  `resultCardId` int,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `mcmRequests_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
